recentTweets.text:
Trump and Republicans want you to think America can't afford to lower costs or provide health care for working families.

But they always seem to find money to fund endless wars.

I won't stop fighting Republicans' America Last budget.

I moved to protect the health care of millions of Americans from Trump's Big Ugly Law, which cut health care so billionaires can enjoy historic tax breaks.

But Republicans are opposing it because they are putting America Last. https://t.co/rrFYKZnNaT

The number one issue for Americans is the cost-of-living crisis. 

Yet, Republicans' latest budget does nothing to lower costs.

They'd rather spend billions of your taxes on the most unpopular war in American history.

It is the very definition of America Last. https://t.co/Sm0H62TUtL

As Yogi Berra said, it's deja vu all over again.

I’m once again about to lead the fight against a Republican budget that does nothing to lower costs.

Instead, this America Last budget wastes your tax dollars on Trump's Iran war. https://t.co/GoEVKwvKOs

Everybody knows costs are way too high. 

So what are Republicans in Washington doing about it? Nothing.

They're pushing a budget that wastes your tax dollars on Trump's Iran war. 

I’m proud to lead the fight against Republicans' America Last agenda. https://t.co/p24xrIqnSB

Donald Trump's censorship at President's House is shameful and un-American.

Loving America means learning from our nation's history, not hiding from it.

I'll keep fighting to pass my Protecting American History Act in Congress to permanently stop Trump's censorship.

There is nothing in Republicans' new America Last budget to lower costs.

Just billions of dollars more for Trump's reckless Iran war.

I'll fight like hell to make sure your tax dollars are used to make your life better — not to enrich billionaires and fund endless wars.

Instead of ending the war he started, Trump continues to make things worse while Americans struggle at home.

Trump's incompetence costs Americans more every single day.

Donald Trump tried to sue his own government to steal taxpayer money and give it to himself and his political allies.

Despite what Trump thinks, your tax dollars are not a slush fund he can abuse.

He's the most corrupt president we've ever had — and it's not even close.

Trump and Republicans in Washington have only made life more expensive.

Americans deserve better than their cuts and broken promises.

I'll keep fighting to ensure every American can feed their family, see their doctor, and live with the dignity they've earned.

While Trump continues his war in Iran, working Americans are having an even harder time making ends meet.

Trump could end the chaos today, but it's no secret why he won't.

He's already admitted that he doesn't think about Americans' financial situation.

I know that our country feels divided.

But America has overcome division before, and we will do it again.

For America's 250th, I gathered Democrats and Republicans here in Philly, in the room where it all began, to remind them that we are stronger together. https://t.co/W2vFOb116V

It's no mystery why costs have gone up so much for American families.

President Trump jacked up prices with his tariff taxes and then made it worse with his disastrous war in Iran.

Everyone knows Trump has nobody to blame but himself. https://t.co/9zo4Wc1rt5

I was proud to stand with an inspiring interfaith group of my fellow Philadelphians to show our support for our Muslim neighbors, who suffered an arson attack over the weekend at the Northeast Philadelphia Islamic Center.

Religious liberty is a sacred American value. https://t.co/GjiBR53ZKv

Trump and Republicans in Washington took health care away from millions just to fund tax giveaways for billionaires.

Over 8 million Americans have lost health care, and that's just the beginning.

I'm introducing the Protecting Americans' Health Care Act to reverse these cuts.

Houses of worship must be places of peace and safety, not targets for violence or intimidation. I am grateful that no one was injured, but the fear caused by this attack is very real.

Our Muslim community deserves our full support.

https://t.co/LTMbgibIvi

Read my full statement here:
https://t.co/LBuAwTilKo

What has made our country great for 250 years is that, even when we fall short, Americans never stop fighting to ensure that all people can live with freedom and equality. We have so much to be proud of and thankful for.

Happy 4th! 🇺🇸 https://t.co/PFySHtKs01

The promise of our country had to be fought for by generations of Americans who refused to accept that liberty and equality belonged only to some.

What makes America exceptional is that for 250 years, Americans kept fighting to bring this nation closer to its founding ideals. https://t.co/kY4WzLv9Cm

Proud to bring my colleagues back to Independence Hall to commemorate the 250th anniversary of the vote for American independence. It was awe inspiring to be present and speak in the same room where exactly 250 years ago our nation’s founders changed the course of history. 🇺🇸 https://t.co/NuzolRAFrs
RT @RepJeffries: Thank you @CongBoyle for hosting a bipartisan House delegation to celebrate the birth of our democracy! https://t.co/aRLIQ…

For 250 years, Americans have always found a way to come together and achieve great things.

It was an honor to host a bipartisan group of my colleagues in Independence Hall, to celebrate our nation's proud history together as fellow Americans, in the room where it all began. https://t.co/tffa1blzPP

250 years ago today, our founding fathers gathered in Philadelphia to bravely vote for independence.

I’m proud to host a bipartisan delegation to celebrate our nation’s founding where it all happened.

Watch here: https://t.co/meSywyGcoz

The top 1% made out like bandits in Trump's so-called "Big Beautiful Bill."

But everyone else is paying the price.

It cut health care for millions of Americans and added trillions to the national debt, all so billionaires could get more tax breaks.

@MacFarlaneNews @the535news https://t.co/AjSgaebGa9

The number one issue for Americans is lowering costs, but instead of doing his job as president, Trump is spending all his time as a wannabe interior designer with a spending problem.

Everyone knows prices are out of control, but Trump just doesn't give a damn. https://t.co/RKAqNkvATR

Everyone knows that prices are too damn high, but Trump and Republicans in Washington just don't care.

The only things we hear from the President are conspiracies about algae in the reflecting pool and progress on his taxpayer-funded billion-dollar vanity ballroom. https://t.co/lRqzTwpsdc

Trump is lying about using taxpayer money for his vanity ballroom while openly admitting he doesn't care about Americans' financial situation. 

What a disgrace. 

I'm demanding an investigation into just how much of your money he's wasting. https://t.co/G56nDa9213

The First Bank of the United States stands as a testament to our nation's ability to come together around shared purpose.

It was an honor to speak at its grand reopening here in Philly — made possible in part by the Great American Outdoors Act, legislation I proudly championed. https://t.co/Y095DhzqhJ

It's another day that ends in "y," which means Trump has managed to make your life more expensive, despite promising he'd lower costs "on day one."

Americans are sick of his chaos and his disastrous economy.

Trump is throwing a fit and refusing to sign a bipartisan bill that would make it easier to afford a home.

This shouldn't be a surprise — Trump obviously doesn't care about lowering costs.

Games like this are why Americans are fed up with Washington.

5 million Americans have now lost their health care thanks to Trump and Republicans in Washington.

This is just the beginning — millions more are going to lose their care.

And why exactly did Republicans do this? To give bigger tax breaks to their billionaire donors.
From one proud dad to the millions of others across America — Happy Father's Day! https://t.co/ov2JtOwJrm

Juneteenth marks the day in 1865 that Union soldiers arrived in Galveston, Texas, to enforce the Emancipation Proclamation.

Today, we honor those who have fought for freedom and recommit ourselves to delivering on America's promise of liberty for all its people. https://t.co/r207nShvzR
https://t.co/IuJ7UX5hwW

As we approach America’s 250th anniversary, we must tell the full truth of our history — the good and the bad.

This fight isn't over, and I won't rest until we stop Trump's censorship.

My full statement on today's court ruling on the slavery exhibits at the President's House: https://t.co/m4V24wPvyH

Trump continues to blame others for his disastrous economy — which is why he's spent his entire second term attacking the Fed over inflation he's causing.

The new Federal Reserve Chair, Kevin Warsh, must protect our economy by defending the Fed from Trump's interference.

Trump said he wouldn't use taxpayer dollars for his ballroom.

He lied.

While Americans struggle to get by due to his tariff taxes and his Iran war, Trump is spending their hard-earned money on yet another vanity project.

When Trump and Republicans in Washington slashed Medicaid, they put families across Pennsylvania at risk.

Our hospitals can't afford these cuts — and we'll all pay the price.

I won't stop fighting to undo these cuts.

Read my op-ed w/ @Lisa_PubCitizen:

https://t.co/VID5epy13a

As we celebrate our 250th, we must uphold our noble founding ideals and tell the truth about our history — all of it.

I have been fighting to have all of the historical exhibits restored at President’s House and am glad a judge ruled they must be back up by July 4th.

Congress

On June 14, 1777, the Continental Congress adopted our flag. That same day, two years prior, the Continental Army was established. 

May our flag forever serve as a symbol of freedom and a reminder of the sacrifices so many made to protect our nation. https://t.co/1K3mFWnVYw

I’m grateful to learn the three Philly police officers shot last night are stable. I’m praying for each of them to make a swift and full recovery.

Last night was a tragic reminder of the danger our police officers face every day as they keep us safe.

https://t.co/SeSv0KPu5w
See my full statement here: https://t.co/fwgssjgfUi

Two years ago, I launched an effort to bring Members of Congress, both Democrats and Republicans, back to the place where it all began 250 years ago: Independence Hall in Philadelphia.

I'm excited this historic ceremonial event will be taking place on July 2. https://t.co/7Glv60TzKL

While you're struggling to get by, Trump is reveling in it — "You know what I really love? I love the inflation."

It's all a game to him.

Inflation keeps climbing, and Trump and Washington Republicans are celebrating a bill that does nothing to lower costs.

The truth is simple: they do not care about working Americans.

If they did, they would actually do something about it. https://t.co/PHX88WfDRh

Trump's illegal tariff taxes cost American families almost $2,000 last year.

But Republicans have allowed Trump to do whatever he wants.  

Republicans' weakness is costing Americans every day. https://t.co/rMj5iwk98n

Everyone knows prices are completely out of control, but don't hold your breath for Trump to lift a finger.

He's too busy building his ballroom and trying to pay off violent criminals who attacked police officers.

Republicans are doubling down on their failed agenda while Americans continue to be crushed by higher costs.

To make it worse, they rejected my effort to permanently stop Trump's slush fund for violent criminals.

They should be ashamed.

The GOP budget bill does nothing to stop Trump from rewarding Jan 6th insurrectionists.

Every House Republican just rejected my amendment to permanently stop Trump from sending YOUR TAX DOLLARS to these violent criminals who attacked police. https://t.co/cdFwlCMrXT

Families are paying more at the pump, more at the grocery store, and more for health care. 

You'd think Republicans would want to do something about it.

Instead, their budget bill doubles down on Trump's failed agenda and does nothing to bring down costs. I will be voting NO. https://t.co/oC8TmwtCrN
https://t.co/TohCgeTH9U

Families count on their local post office.

I stood with local leaders to demand that USPS protect access for residents affected by the closure of the Fishtown post office.

I'll be introducing a bill requiring USPS to work to find replacement locations before closing offices. https://t.co/FrIawYF6pJ

This interview makes it perfectly clear that Trump isn’t done trying to reward the people who assaulted police on Jan 6.

He clearly wants to revive his slush fund for these violent criminals.

Now is the time for so-called moderate Republicans to support legislation to stop him.

The reckless Republican budget bill has exactly zero dollars to help American families.

American families are struggling, but they won't get any help from Donald Trump.

He's too busy building his ballroom and plastering his name onto every building he can find. https://t.co/AtPjDAWTRY

Donald Trump's tariff taxes and his Iran war have sent prices skyrocketing.

His economic agenda is a complete failure — and every American knows it.

Instead of helping struggling families, the only thing Republicans in Washington have done is look for someone else to blame. https://t.co/KSny982flE

GOOD NEWS: The House just passed a bill to support the Ukrainian people and sanction Putin's brutal regime.

Standing with Ukraine makes America — and the world — a safer place.

The Senate must pass this bipartisan bill without delay. https://t.co/YXJ6QHyZaV

The Trump administration seems to think that Americans spending more on everything is somehow a good thing.

Not only are they completely clueless, but they obviously don't care that Americans disapprove of the Trump economy by a three-to-one margin. https://t.co/KFUFJTCdWC

Trump promised to lower costs on day 1.

It's day 500, and everyone knows Trump's disastrous agenda has made life even more expensive.

The average family has already paid over $2,300 more under Trump. But while Americans pay the bill, Trump only seems to care about his ballroom.

🚨The House of Representatives just voted to end Trump's war in Iran.🚨

This disastrous war has put our service members in harm's way and made life even more expensive here at home.

I proudly voted to end this war — and I'm calling on the Senate to pass this immediately.

kurdistanMentions.text:
Because of Trump's Iran war, U.S. oil supplies are now at their lowest levels in over 20 years.

That means gas prices may go even higher than they already are.

Americans can't afford this presidency.

If Trump actually wants to cut gas prices, he should support my bill and end his disastrous Iran war.

My bill suspends the gas tax and uses the money from stopping big oil handouts to fund our highways.

It's time for Trump to choose between his donors and American families. https://t.co/zxvohz6Grq

Americans are paying more for necessities, from gas to groceries to energy bills and more.

Life is already too expensive in America.

Trump and Republicans have only made things worse. https://t.co/6cI2sZ78Yx

Gas prices are skyrocketing because of Trump’s Iran war.

But if Trump really wants to solve the problem he caused, he should support my bill to suspend the gas tax and make up any lost funding to the Highway Trust Fund by ending giveaways to big oil. https://t.co/hHk4lUr1EC

Oil executives shouldn't profit from Trump's war in Iran while Americans struggle to get by.

That's why my bill would suspend the national gas tax when gas prices rise above $4 a gallon and pay for it by stopping subsidies for oil and gas companies. https://t.co/LkAKzuTzI7

assessment.summary: The captured X archive has 5 Kurdistan Lens tweet hits for Brendan F. Boyle. The social-media posture reads as constructive or diplomatic signal because the strongest matched frame is support, partnership, or official-contact language. Top matched terms: Oil / Energy.
assessment.whatItWasLike: When this account mentioned the Kurdish file, the language most often clustered around support, partnership, or official-contact language. I count 0 direct Kurdistan/Kurdish-region term hits, 0 security-frame hits, 2 supportive or diplomatic hits, 0 humanitarian/minority hits, and 5 energy/economic hits in the exported profile window. The latest matched tweet is dated 2026-06-03T19:54:56Z and should be opened before treating this as a final stance.

https://t.co/LA00ASPXal

Putin's brazen attack on the Ukrainian people cannot go unanswered, and America must provide Ukraine with what it needs to end this war.

My statement on Russia's recent attack, which killed innocent Ukrainian civilians, including children: https://t.co/SNBGcxGnJZ

It's good that we've forced the administration to back down from Trump's slush fund for violent criminals, but we can't stop until there is no pathway for this to ever happen again.

Republicans should join me and my colleagues to make such a slush fund illegal.

Projects like the Rail Park in Philadelphia are evidence of what can happen when you put a vision — and federal dollars — to work.

I'm proud to play a part in bringing our neighborhoods together, and I won't stop here. https://t.co/xWw9EvESkX
https://t.co/JXumcbgaeE

Republicans already sent prices skyrocketing and slashed health care for millions of Americans.

Now, they want to double down by drowning people with deadly conditions in more paperwork.

It doesn't get much more cruel than kicking cancer patients off their health care. https://t.co/JUEd3r2hUE
This is the most hopelessly out of touch administration in American history.

For $100 billion, we could extend affordable health care tax credits for years.

But Trump and Republicans are spending it on a war with Iran while driving up costs and evaporating Americans' savings.

Trump knows Americans are paying the price for his war, but he doesn't care.
I will always stand side by side with my LGBTQ friends and neighbors. Happy Pride Month to everyone celebrating here in Philadelphia and across America! https://t.co/VwzkORd5vz
